title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF NEW PIÃAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, TO PIÃAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 3685 / 57 OG No. 10, 1735 (March 6, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2846, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE MUNICIPALITY OF NEW PIÃAN, PROVINCE OF ZAMBOANGA DEL NORTE, TO PIÃAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the Municipality of New Piñan in the Province of Zamboanga del Norte, is changed to Piñan.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
